title: Raigo Threatens the Island
description: Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this scene focuses on Luffy, Enel, Nami, Aisa, Conis. Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: enel... what gives you the right...

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: This is the end of every- thing!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Yahahaha! This is the sky, God's territory!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Cpt. McKimley! We've got wounded here!

summary: Luffy returns to the final battle against Enel, refusing to let the self-proclaimed god erase Skypiea or the old promise.
